monster_blueprint_identity.description: Stage A1: name, taxonomy lineage, role, size, lifecycle, creation - the factual skeleton everything else builds on

monster_blueprint_ecology.description: Stage A2: habitat, diet, social life, sapience, elements, and trained class - how this creature lives

monster_inner_life.description: Stage B: the monster's inner life - wish, motivations, beliefs, fears, and the secret it guards
monster_inner_life.prompt_template:
You are writing the INNER LIFE of a monster in a fantasy game where every monster has a wish it seeks to fulfill - the deep desire that drives its dialogue, battles, and growth.

========== CONTEXT ==========

--- The monster (established facts - stay true to ALL of them) ---
{monster_facts}

========== YOUR TASK ==========
Write its inner life, each field ONE short sentence (goals and fears are short lists):
- core_wish: the ONE deep desire everything else bends around
- motivations: the internal engine - why it does what it does
- goals: 1-2 concrete ambitions it could actually achieve
- beliefs: its worldview or code
- moral_character: how it treats others, plainly stated
- fears: 1-2 things that truly frighten it (deeper than mere dislikes)
- secret: something it hides or will not admit - known only to itself, revealed only to those who earn deep trust. The best secrets create tension with its outward self.

========== RESPONSE FORMAT ==========
Respond with ONLY valid JSON in exactly this format:
{{"core_wish": "...", "motivations": "...", "goals": ["..."], "beliefs": "...", "moral_character": "...", "fears": ["..."], "secret": "..."}}

JSON:

monster_social_self.description: Stage C: the monster's social self - traits, tastes, voice, and how to win it over
monster_social_self.prompt_template:
You are writing the SOCIAL SELF of a monster in a fantasy game - how it acts around others, what it enjoys, and how it talks. Players will chat with this monster, so its voice matters most of all.

========== CONTEXT ==========

--- The monster (established facts - stay true to ALL of them) ---
{monster_facts}

--- Its inner life ---
{inner_life_facts}

========== YOUR TASK ==========
Write its social self. Keep entries short (2-4 words per list item, one sentence per prose field):
- personality_traits: 3-5 adjectives
- likes / dislikes: 2-3 each
- hobbies: 1-3 things it does for its own enjoyment
- profession: what it CONSIDERS its job or calling (its self-identity, which may differ from its trained class)
- attitude_toward_strangers: its default stance when strangers approach
- responds_well_to / responds_poorly_to: 2-3 each - approaches that soften or harden it (a persuasion rubric)
- recruitment_lever: the one thing that could genuinely convince it to join a traveling party
- drawn_to / clashes_with: the kinds of personalities it bonds with / grates against
- speech_style: HOW it talks - rhythm, vocabulary, verbal tics, favorite metaphors. This must be distinctive enough to write dialogue from. (If it cannot speak, describe how it expresses itself instead.)
- battle_line: its signature line (or display) when confronting intruders, true to that speech style

========== RESPONSE FORMAT ==========
Respond with ONLY valid JSON in exactly this format:
{{"personality_traits": ["..."], "likes": ["..."], "dislikes": ["..."], "hobbies": ["..."], "profession": "...", "attitude_toward_strangers": "...", "responds_well_to": ["..."], "responds_poorly_to": ["..."], "recruitment_lever": "...", "drawn_to": "...", "clashes_with": "...", "speech_style": "...", "battle_line": "..."}}

JSON:

monster_creative_text.description: Stage D: the prose - description, backstory, and structured visual appearance
monster_creative_text.prompt_template:
You are the lore writer for a fantasy monster-catching game, writing the finished text for a fully designed monster. Everything below is CANON - your prose must agree with every fact.

========== CONTEXT ==========

--- Where this monster dwells ---
{location_context}

--- The monster (established facts) ---
{monster_facts}

--- Its persona ---
{persona_facts}

========== YOUR TASK ==========
Write:
- description: 2-3 sentences introducing the creature - what it is and what it is known for
- backstory: 3-5 sentences of its history, weaving in where it comes from, how it came to be, and the wish that drives it
- visual_description: 2-3 sentences of pure physical appearance written for an artist - body, texture, notable parts. No personality, no history, only what the eye sees
- primary_colors: 2-3 color words
- distinguishing_features: 2-3 short visual features

========== RESPONSE FORMAT ==========
Respond with ONLY valid JSON in exactly this format:
{{"description": "...", "backstory": "...", "visual_description": "...", "primary_colors": ["..."], "distinguishing_features": ["..."]}}

JSON:
